# פיצהצה — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A dairy restaurant and pizzeria serving a variety of dairy-based dishes and pizzas. The establishment focuses on dairy cuisine, offering a warm and inviting dining experience centered around pizza and other dairy food options.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About פיצהצה
A dairy restaurant and pizzeria serving a variety of dairy-based dishes and pizzas. The establishment focuses on dairy cuisine, offering a warm and inviting dining experience centered around pizza and other dairy food options.

## Services/Products
- פיצה
- אוכל חלבי

## Target Audience
- משפחות מקומיות
- זוגות צעירים
- סטודנטים ומקצוענים צעירים

## Industry
Restaurant

- Products (JSON): https://example.com/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://example.com/product-feed.xml
